title: 'Ghost' Done Items in Calendar View
excerpt: We’ve been using Monday.com for our social media content planner, which has been working well. We like to use the calendar view to organize and plan our month’s post, so we can have a visual sense of sequence and timing.…

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been using Monday.com for our social media content planner, which has been working well. We like to use the calendar view to organize and plan our month’s post, so we can have a visual sense of sequence and timing. My only critique is that it would be really nice to be able to ‘ghost’ items that are marked ‘done’ without removing them from the calendar. It’s useful to keep them there so we can see the calendar’s content AND to know they were completed. But if they could show up with say a 50% opacity.

We don’t want to use colors to indicate complete, because we use colors for the different types of content and platforms already. See screenshot attached for reference.
